home.description: Scientific skin tone analysis based on CIELAB color space for the most accurate foundation recommendations.
home.step1_desc: Take a face photo with a color checker under controlled lighting
home.step2_desc: Color-corrected measurement of skin tone in CIELAB color space
home.step3_desc: CIEDE2000 color difference formula finds the closest foundation match

scan.title: Skin Tone Analysis
scan.upload_prompt: Upload a face photo taken with a color checker
